name: 4pc Wicker Stack Armless Patio Dining Chairs Brown - Threshold™
description:
Add a touch of traditional style to your seating ensemble with the 4-Pack of Wicker Stack Armless Chairs from Threshold™. These four chairs feature an armless design with a saddle-like seat and a back for comfy sitting. Made with a black steel frame, these brown chairs have a woven wicker construction for a textured look. Best of all, the pieces are weather resistant, making them perfect for use on your porch or patio.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
